vocab.example: My history teacher was a fountain of knowledge; he could answer any obscure question about the Napoleonic era without glancing at a book.

vocab.meaning: làm vượt mức mong đợi, tận tâm hơn mức bình thường
vocab.example: She would always go above and beyond, staying after school for hours to help those of us who were struggling with calculus.

vocab.meaning: truyền động lực mạnh mẽ/thúc đẩy ai đó hành động
vocab.example: I was quite a lazy student, but his passionate lectures really lit a fire under me to pursue a career in literature.

vocab.word: be a tough nut to crack
vocab.meaning: một người khó tính/nghiêm khắc (nhưng ẩn chứa giá trị tốt đẹp)
vocab.example: Our physics teacher was a tough nut to crack, but once you showed effort, he became your most supportive mentor.

vocab.meaning: không bỏ sót bất kỳ nỗ lực nào để đạt được mục tiêu
vocab.example: In terms of exam preparation, she left no stone unturned, ensuring we were familiar with every possible question format.
During my rebellious teenage years, Mr. Anh was a guiding light who kept me focused on my academic goals.

vocab.meaning: khai phá/giúp ai đó bộc lộ những gì tốt đẹp nhất
vocab.example: She had a unique ability to bring the best out of her students, even those who lacked self-confidence.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ giỏi/thành thạo trong lĩnh vực của mình
vocab.example: You could tell she really knew her stuff because she simplified complex biological processes into easy-to-understand stories.

vocab.meaning: điều may mắn/tuyệt vời thêm vào một tình huống vốn đã tốt
vocab.example: She was already a brilliant teacher, but her sense of humor was the icing on the cake that made every lesson enjoyable.

vocab.meaning: giúp ai đó trở nên nổi tiếng/thành công/có vị thế
vocab.example: His rigorous training for the debate team really put our school on the map during the national competitions.
